3250430.name: Absolution of the Dead
3250430.description:
The Soviets knew they would lose the war. In a desperate attempt at victory, they unleashed a hell upon the battlefront that would consume Europe...

You wake up in a zombie infested lab, the only way out is to descend into pure chaos. As you go from room to room slaughtering the undead, you'll go deeper into the trenches of your mind to uncover the truth of the outbreak.

You awake in the depths of an abandoned Soviet facility. Survive hordes of the undead by growing your undead killing arsenal. Find and upgrade your weapon, loot for explosives and equipment, and set up traps to slaughter the dead. Descend deeper into the lab to uncover hidden secrets and ways to enhance your arsenal beyond comprehension.

🛠️ Find attachments to upgrade your weapons.

💥 Loot for explosives and equipment to make killing the undead a breeze.

🧪 Inject serums to enhance your zombie killing skills.
3250430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
